raw_description:
Comfortable Accommodations:Jeddah Marriott Hotel Madinah Road in Jeddah offers spacious rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes a work desk, minibar, and free WiFi, ensuring a pleasant stay.Exceptional Facilities:Guests can enjoy spa facilities, a fitness centre, sun terrace, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Additional amenities include a steam room, wellness packages, and a children’s playground, catering to all ages.Dining Experience:The modern, family-friendly restaurant serves international cuisine with halal and vegetarian options. Breakfast includes local specialities, warm dishes, fresh pastries, and a variety of beverages.Prime Location:Located 9 km from King Abdulaziz International Airport, the hotel is an 18-minute walk from Jeddah International Exhibition and Convention Centre. Nearby attractions include Mall of Arabia and Jeddah Corniche.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.9for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Jeddah Marriott Hotel Madinah Road. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Free parking.
